knowledge_base.answer:
👋 **Karibu Unasemeje Support!**
I'm your AI Assistant. I can help you with:

• 🚀 **How to place an order**
• 💰 **Adding funds & checking balance**
• 📦 **Tracking your orders**
• 🎁 **Referral bonuses**
• 🛠️ **Troubleshooting issues**

Just type your question below, or use the Quick Actions on the left!

🛒 **We offer hundreds of premium, high-quality services across all major social platforms!**

I can pull up some live examples for you right now. Here is what's trending:

🚀 **Placing an order is super easy!**
1️⃣ Go to **New Order**.
2️⃣ Pick your **Category** (IG, TikTok, etc.).
3️⃣ Select the **Service** you want.
4️⃣ Paste your **Profile or Post Link**.
5️⃣ Enter **Quantity** and hit **CONFIRM BOOST**!

💡 *Pro Tip: Make sure your account is PUBLIC before ordering followers or views!*

💰 **To add funds to your wallet:**
1️⃣ Go to the **Add Funds** page.
2️⃣ Ensure your **M-Pesa Payment Nodes** are saved in your profile!
3️⃣ Enter the amount in the Paynecta checkout portal.
4️⃣ Complete the M-Pesa prompt.

⚡ *Deposits are auto-verified instantly! We accept M-Pesa and other mobile money methods via the secure Paynecta portal.*

💰 **Your current wallet balance is KES {balance}.**

Got some loose change? Top up via the **Add Funds** page and keep the aura boosting! 🚀

📦 **You currently have {active_orders} active order(s) processing!**

Most orders start within 0-5 minutes. You can track their live status on the **My Orders** page. If one gets stuck, our system auto-refunds or retries automatically!

🚨 **M-Pesa sent but not in wallet?**
1️⃣ Did you send it from one of your **Registered Funding Channels** (Payment Nodes)?
2️⃣ Auto-verify takes up to 5 minutes.
3️⃣ If it's been longer, click 'Human Support' below and send us the **M-Pesa Code** so we can credit you manually! 🛠️

🔒 **To change your password:**
Scroll down on the **Add Funds** or **Dashboard** page to the **'Modify Security Gateway'** section. Enter your current password and set a new one. Stay secure, boss! 🛡️

📱 **To update your M-Pesa numbers:**
Go to **Add Funds** -> **'Modify Account Profile'**. You can add up to 2 Alternative Funding Nodes. 

⚠️ *IMPORTANT: You MUST click 'Save Profile Changes' BEFORE making a deposit, or the system won't recognize your payment!*

💵 **Our Pricing:**
All services are priced **per 1,000 (1k)**. 

For example, if a service says **KES 50/1k**, and you order **2,000 followers**, it will cost you **KES 100**!

💡 *Check the 'Services' page to see the exact rate for every platform!*

🎁 **The Unasemeje Referral Plug!**
Share your unique referral code with your squad. Every time they buy a service, **YOU get a 10% commission** in your wallet!

💸 *Passive income kwa mtandao! Check your code on the **Referrals** page.*

💬 **Ordering Custom Comments:**
1️⃣ Select a 'Custom Comments' service in **New Order**.
2️⃣ A text box will appear instead of the quantity box.
3️⃣ Type your comments (**one per line**).
4️⃣ The system automatically counts them and calculates the price!

🔥 *You are the director!*

⏳ **Order stuck on 'Pending'?**
Don't panic! Sometimes the provider's server is updating. 

1️⃣ Wait 15-30 minutes.
2️⃣ If it still hasn't started, go to **My Orders** and click 'Sync Status'.
3️⃣ If it failed, the money is **auto-refunded** to your wallet! ✅

🔗 **Link Rules (Very Important!):**
• **Followers/Profile Views:** Paste your PROFILE link (e.g., instagram.com/username).
• **Likes/Views/Comments:** Paste the specific POST link.
• ⚠️ **Your profile MUST be PUBLIC!** Private accounts cannot receive followers or views, and the order will fail.

❌ **Can I cancel an order?**
Once an order is placed, it's sent to the provider instantly and **cannot be cancelled**.

However, if the order fails or remains incomplete, the system will **automatically refund** the money back to your wallet! 💸

🛡️ **Is it safe? Will I get banned?**
100% Safe! We use premium, high-retention methods that mimic organic growth. 

• No passwords required (Never share your password!).
• Safe for all accounts.
• If an order drops, many of our premium services come with a **30-day refill guarantee**! 🔄
